request.query: Using the provided evidence only: the scoreboard at the end of the 3rd quarter reads Bristol Central 52, East Catholic 40, with Bristol Central leading and the clock at 0:00.0 in the 3rd. The listed options are: A) 55 to 40, Bristol Central leading; B) 52 to 52, tied; C) 55 to 40, East Catholic leading; D) 64 to 32, Bristol Central leading; E) 64 to 32, East Catholic leading. Which single option should be selected as the best match despite the mismatch, and why? Prefer preserving the correct leader/team-status first, then the closest score pattern; explicitly reject the others.
